POS OF: MEMO OF P&A IN OPPOS TO PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION; DEC OF MARTIN GRAN IN SUPPORT FILED BY RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S MANAGERS AND SUPERVISORS' ASSOCIATION'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS CONTINUED TO MAY 2, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302 PER AGREEMENT OF ALL PARTIES AND TO GIVE PETITIONER THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6C. PETITIONER MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE PETITION TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN APRIL 23, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-23-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
DECLARATION OF LISETTE ADAMS FILED BY PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S MANAGERS AND SUPERVISORS' ASSOCIATION
NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S MANAGERS AND SUPERVISORS' ASSOCIATION HEARING SET FOR APR-23-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
RESPONSE TO PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION FILED BY RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S MANAGERS AND SUPERVISORS' MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS CONTINUED TO MAY 14, 2014. ON APRIL 23, 2014, THE COURT ORDERED THE MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THAT ORDER. THE COURT WILL CONTINUE THE MOTION ONE ADDITIONAL TIME TO ALLOW THE MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE A COPY OF THE PETITION TO COMPEL WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF PETITION PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar May-14-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S MANAGERS AND SUPERVISORS' Motion To Compel Arbitration is off calendar per request of moving party. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar May-02-2014 Continued To May-14-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S MANAGERS AND SUPERVISORS' Motion To Compel Arbitration is continued to May 14, 2014. On April 23, 2014, the court ordered the moving party to provide a courtesy copy of the petition to compel arbitration with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. The moving party failed to comply with that order. The Court will continue the motion one additional time to allow the moving party to provide a copy of the petition to compel with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-23-2014 Continued To May-02-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested.
PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S MANAGERS AND SUPERVISORS' ASSOCIATION'S Motion To Compel Arbitration is continued to May 2, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 302 per agreement of all parties and to give Petitioner the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6C. Petitioner must deliver courtesy copies of the Petition to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 23, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and opposition papers. Judge: A. James Robertson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
